title: docs: update README — 2026-06-09
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News + Recent Apps sections.

gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot gave the README its daily polish, updating the latest news and recent apps sections.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to refresh the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Visitors to the GitHub repository will see the most up-to-date community apps and news.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) and Polly the Bee updating a giant digital billboard or a physical notice board with new pixel art polaroids of community apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the bee mascot pinning new pixel polaroids to a wooden notice board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
